case_title: SMITH, GENESE DOPSON vs. SARRAIL, LYNCH AND HALL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING MOT TO CONTINUE TRIAL FILED BY DEFT.

C.MITCHELL, JUDGE; M.HOLMES, REPORTER; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK 2:05 PM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEF'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION IS DENIED. PLTF'S EXHIBITS MARKED FOR ID. DEFENSE COUNSEL ANNOUNCES THAT A SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED. DEFT SHALL PAY $3856.33 AND UPON RECEIPT OF THE CHECK, PLTF SHALL FILE A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS ARE WITH- DRAWN. COURT ADJOURNS.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-20-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
